creator: juha.o.ylitalo@nokia.com
text:
On Tue, 2002-01-29 at 18:58, ext wrote:
> Synopsis: ATAPI CD-ROM makes system reboot with DVD movie.
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: sheldonh
> State-Changed-When: Tue Jan 29 08:57:31 PST 2002
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Quite a lot of work has been done on the ata driver since
> 4.4-RELEASE.  Can anyone confirm that this problem exists
> in a 2002 4.4-STABLE or 4.5-RC?
> 
> Please copy your feedback to <bug-followup@freebsd.org>, using the
> subject line of this message.

Just wanted to let you know, that I am going to see, if I can get my
friend to loan his DVD disk for me once again, and with any luck I can
give you some real feedback at the end of this week (based on FreeBSD
4.5-RELEASE).

--
